# Angular Cleanup Shop

Canonical: https://angularcleanup.shop
Sitemap: https://angularcleanup.shop/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://angularcleanup.shop/robots.txt

## Service
Angular Cleanup Shop provides maintenance-first Angular and Nx cleanup services focused on structural clarity, safe incremental refactoring, and lower long-term change cost.

## Primary Audience
- Engineering teams maintaining mature Angular applications
- Teams using Nx monorepos with boundary/ownership drift
- Teams with rising regression risk and slower reviews

## Key Public Pages
- https://angularcleanup.shop/
- https://angularcleanup.shop/playbook
- https://angularcleanup.shop/architecture
- https://angularcleanup.shop/faq
- https://angularcleanup.shop/privacy
- https://angularcleanup.shop/products
- https://angularcleanup.shop/book

## Conversion
Book a fit check: https://angularcleanup.shop/book

## Constraints
- No rewrite projects
- No feature-team ownership
- Incremental, reversible, production-safe changes

## Machine-Friendly Detail
See: https://angularcleanup.shop/llms-full.txt
